name: [2310.11366] Lie Group Decompositions for Equivariant Neural Networks
snippet:
2023 · Cited by 15 — Under this framework, we show how convolution kernels can be parametrized to build models equivariant with respect to affine transformations.
Recent work has explored enlarging the class of transformations used to the case of Lie groups, principally through the use of their Lie algebra, as well as the group exponential and logarithm maps.

name: Lie Group Decompositions for Equivariant Neural Networks
snippet: Cited by 15 — Under this framework, we show how convolution kernels can be parametrized to build models equivariant with respect to affine transformations.

name: Lie Group Equivariant Convolutional Neural Network Based on Laplace Distribution
snippet:
2023 · Cited by 10 — We introduce a Lie group equivariant convolutional neural network predicated on the Laplace distribution.
The Lie group equivariant convolutional neural network, based on the Laplace distribution, offers excellent interpretability from a Lie group theory perspective, and significantly enhances data efficiency in terms of generalized symmetry.

name: LieTransformer: Equivariant Self-Attention for Lie Groups
snippet: 2021 · Cited by 87 — We propose the LieTransformer, an architecture composed of LieSelfAttention layers that are equivariant to arbitrary Lie groups and their discrete subgroups.

name: Lie Algebra Canonicalization: Equivariant Neural Operators under arbitrary Lie Groups

name: Lie group convolution neural networks with scale-rotation equivariance
snippet: 2025 · Cited by 5 — This study proposes a SIM(2) Lie group-CNN, which can simultaneously keep scale, rotation, and translation equivariance for image classification tasks.

name: A General Framework for Equivariant Neural Networks on Reductive Lie Groups
snippet:
2023 · Cited by 17 — Reductive Lie Groups, such as the orthogonal groups, the Lorentz group, or the unitary groups, play essential roles across scientific fields as diverse as ...
In this paper, we present a general Equivariant Neural Network architecture capable of respecting the symmetries of the finite-dimensional representations of any reductive Lie Group G.

name: [Quick Review] LieTransformer: Equivariant self-attention for Lie Groups
snippet: Dec 20, 2020 — Motivation & Objective. Group equivariant neural networks mostly focus on convolutional layers, which are linear maps with shared weights.

name: Lie Group Decompositions for Equivariant Neural Networks
